blockers.detail: agents/src/trader/ directory does not exist. No trader CLI, orchestrator, schemas, or agents have been implemented yet. The firefly pipeline is present under agents/src/firefly/ but no trader sub-package exists.

HTTP 403 from remote environment network policy: query1.finance.yahoo.com and query2.finance.yahoo.com are not in the egress allowlist. yfinance calls fail with 'Host not in allowlist'. Cannot fetch live price data or run backtest against realized returns.

notes: This is a zero-data stub produced by the daily-trader evaluation agent on 2026-06-18. All scan_results, backtest_results, and fom_table are empty because both the trader pipeline and the market-data network path are unavailable. See blockers array for remediation steps.
